html:
Exclusive to:

“Containing "essence de moustique" making any holder seem friendly to wild mosquitos.”

-

Lil' Itchy is a character-specific Item craftable only by Wurt with the "Mosquito Incognito" skill. Lil' Itchy makes all Mosquitos passive to a player with this item in their inventory.

Itchcraft II

Wurt with the "Itchcraft II" skill and Lil' Itchy in the inventory can pick up Mosquitos by holding the interact key or clicking on them.

Gallery

  • Lil' Itchy concept art from Staying Afloat update stream from Rhymes with Play.

Lil' Itchy
"Bring your little buddy to blend in with the bloodsuckers."

Repaired By:

"mosquitomusk"
“Those suckers will never get me!”
–Wilson
“It's no Bernie.”
–Willow
“Is huggable bug friend!”
–Wolfgang
“What an ugly little doll.”
–Wendy
“PEST DETERRENT”
–WX-78
“The pheromones render one undetectable to the cursed bloodsuckers.”
–Wickerbottom
“A stuffed skeeter? This is what the kids like these days, eh?”
–Woodie
“Do I have to touch it? What if I just stand near it?”
–Maxwell
“'Tis rather useful för a föul little döll.”
–Wigfrid
“Can we keep it?”
–Webber
“In case of uninvited pests.”
–Warly
“Huggy bug”
–Wormwood
“Somehow it's still not the creepiest doll I've seen.”
–Winona
“A cuddly creepy-crawly!”
–Wortox
“Lil' Itchy wanna play with friends?”
–Wurt
“That's not a chew toy, Woby!”
–Walter
“This had better work...”
–Wanda
“Containing "essence de moustique" making any holder seem friendly to wild mosquitos.”
-
Lil' Itchy is a character-specific Item craftable only by Wurt with the "Mosquito Incognito" skill. Lil' Itchy makes all Mosquitos passive to a player with this item in their inventory.
Itchcraft II[edit | edit source]
Wurt with the "Itchcraft II" skill and Lil' Itchy in the inventory can pick up Mosquitos by holding the interact key or clicking on them.

Lil' Itchy concept art from Staying Afloat update stream from Rhymes with Play.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Lil' Itchy là một Vật phẩm dành riêng cho nhân vật chỉ có thể chế tạo bởi Wurt với kỹ năng "Muỗi ẩn danh". Lil' Itchy khiến tất cả Mosquitos bị động đối với người chơi có vật phẩm này trong kho của họ.
title: Lil' Itchy

{{Scrapbook Info|Containing "essence de moustique" making any holder seem friendly to wild mosquitos.}}
Lil' Itchy is a character-specific Item craftable only by [[Wurt]] with the "[[Mosquito Incognito]]" skill. Lil' Itchy makes all [[Mosquito]]s passive to a player with this item in their inventory. 
==={{picDark|48|Itchcraft II}} Itchcraft II ===
Wurt with the "[[Itchcraft II]]" skill and Lil' Itchy in the inventory can pick up [[Mosquito]]s by holding the interact key or clicking on them.
